  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "High risk of form blowout or structural failure during the pour"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pour preparation immediately",
    "Install additional diagonal bracing, stakes, and kickers per ACI 347 guidelines",
    "Verify all form ties and strongbacks are secured before resuming"
  ],
  "rationale": "Active formwork setup lacks the necessary lateral bracing to resist hydrostatic pressure during concrete placement, presenting a severe blowout hazard that could cause worker injury and structural failure.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete)"
  ]
}
